pr.title: Record: 11L XSA-all + Full GPTQ + Selective Pruning (val_bpb=1.1154, 3-seed)

output.summary: Extends the Parallel Muon stack with XSA on all 11 layers plus selective post-GPTQ ±1 pruning to keep cross-position mixing while trimming low-impact quantized values.
techniques: XSA applied at every layer to mix positions from layer 0
Full Hessian GPTQ int6 quantization before selective ±1 pruning by reconstruction error
Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon execution stack
